description: Collects data about products added to the cart. Reads from the data layer (GA4, Universal Analytics, or custom). Map product fields (SKU, name, price, etc.) to your data structure. Use a Data layer event trigger (e.g. add_to_cart). Cannot be used together with ecommerce cart update tag.

when_to_use: Tracking add-to-cart events from ecommerce data layer
Migrating from GA4 or Universal Analytics ecommerce
Custom data layer with add_to_cart or similar events

template_options.description: Ecommerce configuration. Must include product_mapping, category_mapping_type, products_array.

template_options.products_array.description: Source of product array in data layer. Use variable syntax, e.g. '{{ ecommerce }}.items' or '{{ items }}'.

template_options.product_mapping.description: Map data layer keys to product fields. sku is required; others optional.

template_options.category_mapping_type.description: How to handle subcategories. disabled = no subcategories; split_by_delimiter = category field with slash (e.g. House/Furniture/Table); use_mapping = separate category2-5 keys.

options.split_by_delimiter: Categories in single field, separated by / (UA style)
options.use_mapping: Separate keys for category2, category3, etc. (GA4 style)

template_options.currency.description: Source of currency. Variable syntax or key path, e.g. '{{ ecommerce }}.currency' or 'currency'.

template_options.category_mapping.description: When category_mapping_type is use_mapping: keys for category2, category3, category4, category5.

template_options.custom_dimensions.description: Custom dimensions for the event. Each has id (1-400) and value.

template_options.product_dimensions.description: Product-level custom dimensions. Each has id (1-20) and value.

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

ga4_style.description: GA4 data layer format (add_to_cart event, items array)
ga4_style.prerequisite: Create Data layer event trigger with event name 'add_to_cart' (GA4) or 'addToCart' (UA).

custom_data_layer.description: Custom data layer with items array

update_example.description: Update product mapping or add custom dimensions

common_mistakes: Using together with ecommerce cart update tag (they conflict)
Wrong products_array path - verify data layer structure
Using page view trigger instead of Data layer event trigger
Event name mismatch (add_to_cart vs addToCart for GA4 vs UA)

no_data_collected: Verify Data layer event trigger with correct event name
Check products_array path matches your data layer
Ensure product_mapping keys match your product object structure
Use debug mode to inspect data layer
wrong_product_data: Adjust product_mapping to match your data layer keys
For GA4: item_id, item_name, price, quantity, item_category, etc.
For UA: id, name, price, quantity, category, etc.
